spouse_meeting_prediction.description: Comprehensive rules for predicting how, where, and through whom the native will meet their spouse
spouse_meeting_prediction.methodology: Uses D1, D9, KP sub-lords, Jaimini Darakaraka, and classical Vedic combinations
spouse_meeting_prediction.reference: Brihat Parasara Hora Shastra, Jaimini Sutras, KP Reader

direction_from_sign.description: Direction spouse will come from based on zodiac sign on 7th house cusp or 7th lord's rashi

direction_from_planet.description: Direction indicated by planet in or ruling the 7th house

distance_from_7th_lord_house.description: How far the spouse is likely from based on house placement of 7th lord in D1

1.label: Same locality
1.description: Spouse from your own community or neighborhood. You may already know them.
1.meeting_context: Self-initiated — through personal activities, gym, training, or self-improvement
1.modern: Someone in your daily life, same apartment complex, or regular hangout spots

2.label: Family circles
2.description: Spouse through family connections or financial circles. Same city likely.
2.meeting_context: Family gathering, restaurant, financial institution, or through family friends
2.modern: Family introduction, family WhatsApp groups, community gatherings

3.label: Nearby area
3.description: Spouse from neighboring area. Siblings or neighbors may connect you.
3.meeting_context: Through siblings, neighbors, messaging, short travel, or communication
3.modern: Social media DMs, dating apps, WhatsApp/Telegram, matchmaking by siblings

4.label: Same hometown
4.description: Spouse from your native place or early life connections.
4.meeting_context: Through mother, maternal relatives, from childhood or school
4.modern: Childhood sweetheart, school/college alumni network, hometown connections

5.label: Social circles
5.description: Spouse through entertainment, romance, or creative pursuits in same region.
5.meeting_context: Party, social gathering, creative/art event, sports, dating
5.modern: Dating apps (Tinder, Bumble), entertainment events, friend's party

6.label: Through service/work
6.description: Spouse may be a colleague or met through challenging circumstances.
6.meeting_context: Workplace, hospital, service organization, charity event
6.modern: Office romance, hospital/clinic, NGO work, volunteering

7.label: Known circles
7.description: Spouse from same social standing. Met through conventional means.
7.meeting_context: Public event, business meeting, social gathering, networking
7.modern: Professional networking events, industry conferences, business meetings

8.label: Unexpected place
8.description: Spouse met during a transformative or crisis situation. Hard to predict distance.
8.meeting_context: During a difficult period, accident, research, occult/mystery setting
8.modern: Unexpected encounter, crisis situation, insurance/legal matter, online mystery groups

9.label: Different state/culture
9.description: Spouse from different cultural background, state, or country. Higher education link.
9.meeting_context: University, temple, pilgrimage, long-distance travel, conference
9.modern: Inter-state move for education, international conference, religious community

10.label: Through career
10.description: Spouse connected through profession. Distance depends on career mobility.
10.meeting_context: Workplace, corporate event, professional conference, through father's contacts
10.modern: LinkedIn, professional conference, office, corporate transfer

11.label: Through friends/community
11.description: Spouse introduced through friends or large community networks.
11.meeting_context: Friend's introduction, social club, community organization, online groups
11.modern: Social media (Instagram, Facebook), mutual friends, community apps, matrimony sites

12.label: Foreign/distant land
12.description: Strong indication of spouse from foreign country or very distant place.
12.meeting_context: Foreign land, spiritual retreat, hospital, isolated/private setting
12.modern: International dating apps, met while traveling abroad, online long-distance

foreign_spouse_yogas.description: Combinations strongly indicating spouse from different culture or foreign land

yogas.name: Rahu in 7th House
yogas.condition: Rahu placed in 7th house of D1 or D9
yogas.interpretation: Spouse likely from different culture, caste, or foreign background

yogas.name: 7th Lord in 12th House
yogas.condition: Lord of 7th house placed in 12th house
yogas.interpretation: Strong yoga for spouse from foreign land or very distant place

yogas.name: 7th Lord conjunct Rahu
yogas.condition: 7th lord in conjunction with Rahu in any house
yogas.interpretation: Inter-caste or foreign marriage likely. Unconventional partner

yogas.name: Darakaraka in 12th
yogas.condition: Jaimini Darakaraka planet placed in 12th house
yogas.interpretation: Spouse from foreign country. Possible relocation abroad after marriage

yogas.name: Venus-Rahu Conjunction
yogas.condition: Venus conjunct Rahu (for males seeking female spouse)
yogas.interpretation: Attraction to foreign or unconventional partner. Intense romantic desires

yogas.name: Jupiter-Rahu Conjunction
yogas.condition: Jupiter conjunct Rahu (for females seeking male spouse)
yogas.interpretation: Husband from different cultural or religious background

yogas.name: 12th Lord in 7th
yogas.condition: Lord of 12th house placed in 7th house
yogas.interpretation: Foreign influence on marriage. Possible settlement abroad after marriage

yogas.name: 7th Lord in Rahu Nakshatra
yogas.condition: 7th lord placed in Ardra, Swati, or Shatabhisha nakshatra
yogas.interpretation: Unconventional meeting or partner from unexpected background

marriage_type_yogas.description: Determining love marriage vs arranged marriage from planetary combinations

love_marriage.name: 5th-7th Lord Connection
love_marriage.condition: 5th lord conjunct, aspecting, or exchanging signs with 7th lord
love_marriage.interpretation: Romance transforms into marriage. Classic love marriage yoga

love_marriage.name: Venus-Mars Connection
love_marriage.interpretation: Passionate attraction leads to relationship and eventually marriage

love_marriage.name: Rahu on 5th or 7th
love_marriage.interpretation: Unconventional romance. May break social norms for love

love_marriage.name: 5th Lord in 7th House
love_marriage.condition: Lord of 5th house placed in 7th house
love_marriage.interpretation: Love affair leads directly to marriage

love_marriage.name: 7th Lord in 5th House
love_marriage.condition: Lord of 7th house placed in 5th house
love_marriage.interpretation: Marriage partner becomes your romantic love

love_marriage.name: Venus in 5th House
love_marriage.interpretation: Strong romantic nature. Love relationship highly likely before marriage

love_marriage.name: Moon-Venus Connection
love_marriage.interpretation: Deep emotional and romantic bond. Feelings drive the relationship

love_marriage.name: 5th-7th-11th Connection
love_marriage.interpretation: Love marriage with fulfillment of desires. Very strong indication

arranged_marriage.name: 4th-7th Connection
arranged_marriage.condition: 4th lord connected with 7th lord or house
arranged_marriage.interpretation: Family plays dominant role in spouse selection

arranged_marriage.name: 9th-7th Connection
arranged_marriage.condition: 9th lord connected with 7th lord or house

arranged_marriage.name: Saturn in 7th
arranged_marriage.interpretation: Structured and formal marriage process. May involve delays

arranged_marriage.name: Jupiter Aspect on 7th
arranged_marriage.interpretation: Elders' guidance and blessings determine marriage. Traditional approach

arranged_marriage.name: No 5th-7th Link
arranged_marriage.interpretation: Romance not the primary driver. Family-arranged union more likely

meeting_circumstances.description: Planet aspecting or in 7th house indicates the atmosphere of first meeting

examples: Heated debate that turns to attraction

nakshatra_meeting_flavor.description: Nakshatra of 7th lord adds nuance to the meeting energy

fire_nakshatras.flavor: Sudden, impulsive, passionate first meeting. Love at first sight possible.

earth_nakshatras.flavor: Practical, stable setting. Meeting through grounded circumstances.

air_nakshatras.flavor: Through communication or chance. Unexpected wind of fate brings you together.

water_nakshatras.flavor: Emotional, nurturing event. Deep feeling of connection from the start.

confidence_rules.description: How to score confidence when multiple systems agree
confidence_rules.high_confidence: 3+ systems agree (D1 sign + D1 planet + D9 + KP/Jaimini)
confidence_rules.low_confidence: Only 1 system indicates, others silent or conflicting
confidence_rules.note: Always present dominant + secondary predictions to user

spouse_meeting_prediction.source: Brihat Parasara Hora Shastra, Jaimini Sutras, KP Astrology, aaps.space, Classical Vedic Texts
